parameters-en.Bass: Adds a 150Hz bass boost to the signal. 0.0 is flat.
parameters-en.Treble: Adds a 3.5kHz treble boost to the signal. 0.0 is flat.
parameters-en.Low Cut: Applies a 90Hz low cut (high pass) filter to the signal (6dB/octave).
parameters-en.Volume: Controls the overall output level of the DI.
